Dear All,

Welcome to the official broadcast channel for the Dubai International Aquatics Championships 2026 (DIAC 2026).

Abdelrahman El Morshedy

Dear Team, 
The accreditation registration is now closed, as the deadline was Wednesday, 15th April 2026 at 12:00 noon (Dubai time).
Please note that no accreditations will be processed after this deadline.
Thank you.
